headline: Northrop Grumman Expands Long Term Defense Role With New Aircraft Wins
summary: Northrop Grumman (NYSE:NOC) has secured a contract to provide its Common Infrared Countermeasures system for Germany’s CH-47 Chinook helicopter fleet. The company is also accelerating production of its B-21 Raider stealth bomber under a new U.S. Air Force contract. Both contracts expand Northrop Grumman’s role in next generation aircraft protection and long range strike platforms. Northrop Grumman enters this news cycle with its shares at $736.3 and a 52.5% return over the past year, while...
